APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BIBB-MERRITT, ANGELA

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ANGELA BIBB-MERRITT'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. ANGELA BIBB-MERRITT HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN CSR #4780 (D206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT BIBB-MERRITT, ANGELA
